_comment: CANONICAL EXEMPLAR — Rhea sourcing-lane audit. ADR-0006 Contract A. Every Rhea agent run MUST emit a file whose top-level keys + types match this exemplar exactly. The parser at scripts/rheaJsonReport.js is authoritative; this exemplar mirrors its requireSchema(). DO NOT remove or rename top-level keys. DO NOT change `lane` or `weight` values. ADDITIONAL fields are OK (e.g., `generatedAt`, `controllableFailures`, `uncontrollableFailures` get recomputed by the parser).
_validate: Before saving your real report, run: node scripts/rheaJsonReport.js --json output/rhea_report_c<XX>.json — exit 0 means schema is valid; exit 2 means schema violation (parser prints what's missing/wrong).
_pipeline_27: Shipped S225 to close G-W54 (Rhea agent JSON schema vs rheaJsonReport.js validator — 2 manual reformats per cycle). See docs/plans/2026-05-22-c94-gap-log-triage.md §3 C5.
